tuv.seg: { $actionType }<playIcon></playIcon> did they accurately speak the sentence?
{ $actionType }<playIcon></playIcon> Ɓe tarii konngol ngol taro yuɓɓungo?
{ $actionType }<recordIcon></recordIcon> kisa tara konngol ngol daande dow

All voice clips in the dataset are scrubbed of personally identifying information. When a contributor provides demographic data via their profile, that information is de-identified from their voice clips before being bundled for download in the dataset and is never made public on their profile page.

Lefon sawto ngonkon e leemre keɓe kon fof ko momtaaɗe kala humpito waawngo heftine neɗɗo. So ballitoowo hokkii keɓe leƴrenndiide e heftinirde mum, ngoon humpito ɗawtinte e lefon sawto joom mum hade makkon tiggeede ngam aawtagol e leemre keɓe ndee kadi waɗetaake e peñcu hay sahaa e hello heftnirde makko.

Anonymized user data like age, gender, and accent helps improve the audio data used to train the accuracy of speech recognition engines. Your username and email will never be associated with your submitted data, and you can choose whether to make your username public or anonymous.

Keɓe kuutoro ɗe innitaaka wona duuɓi, njogoram e ngaddiin ena walla ɓamtude keɓe ajoo kuutorɗeeɗe ngam eeltude ceeɓndam masiŋaaji keftinooji haala. Innde maa kuutoro e iimeel maa njokkondirtaake e keɓe maa naatnaaɗe hay sahaa, kadi aɗa waawi suɓaade yaltinde innde maa kuutoro e peñcu walla alaa.
A voice clip is marked "valid" when a user gives it a Yes vote.
Lefel sawto maantete "jaalɗii" so kuutoro wootanii ngel Eey.
Why an email? We may need to contact you in the future about changes to the dataset, an email provides us a point of contact.
Hol sabaabu iimeel? Amin cokli jokkondirde e mah e ko fayi arde baɗte bayle e leemre keɓe ndee, iimeel hokkata min feere jokkondirde e mah.
By editing your goal, you may lose your existing progress.
Taƴtaade faandaare maa ena gasa mbaasaa taaɓagol goodngol maa.
By opting in to receive emails you state that you are okay with Mozilla handling this info as explained in Mozilla’s <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.
Suɓaade heɓde iimeeliiji firti ko aɗa yahdi e kuutoragol Mozilla ngoo humpito hono no facciraa e <privacyLink>Dawirgol Duturo</privacyLink> Mozilla.
You agree to not attempt to determine the identity of speakers in the Common Voice dataset
A jaɓii waasde etaade anndude holi haalooɓe e leemre keɓe Common Voice ndee
By providing some information about yourself, the audio data you submit to Common Voice will be more useful to Speech Recognition engines that use this data to improve their accuracy.
So a hokkii humpito seeɗa baɗte maa, keɓe ojoo naatnataa e Common Voice maa ɓur kadi nafde masiŋaaji Keftinooji Haala kuutortooɗi ɗeen keɓe ngam ɓamtude ceeɓndam mum'en.
By using Common Voice, you agree to our <termsLink>Terms</termsLink> and <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>
Huutoraade Common Voice firti ko aɗa jaɓi ɗooftaade <termsLink>sarɗiiji</termsLink> e <privacyLink>Konngol Suturo</privacyLink> amen
Change your email via Settings under Login Identity
Waylu iimeel maa to Teelte gonɗe les Heftinirde Seŋorde
Collecting sentences from the public domain, or writing new ones for the public domain.
Roɓindaade konnguɗi e jeyi peñcu, walla winndude jeyi peñcu goɗɗi kesi.
Common Voice data plus all other voice datasets above.
Keɓe Common Voice e leeme keɓe goɗɗe gonɗe dow ɗee fof.
Common Voice is Mozilla's initiative to help teach machines how real people speak.
Common Voice ko eɓɓoore Mozilla ngam wallude masiŋaaji jaŋngude no yimɓe kaaldata.
Common Voice is part of Mozilla's initiative to help teach machines how real people speak.
Common Voice ko huunde e eɓɓooje Mozilla ngam wallude masiŋaaji jaŋngude no yimɓe kaaldata.
Common Voice is the world’s largest publicly available, multi-language voice dataset.
Common Voice ko leemre keɓe limtiɗemɗiire heɓootoonde e peñcu ɓurnde mawnude e winndere ndee .

Common Voice recordings are used by academics, small businesses, and voice recognition enthusiasts to help train and grow publicly available resources like voice models.
Can you let us know why you would like your recordings deleted?

Nanngite Common Voice huutortoo ɗum'en ko jaaɓihaaɗtiyaŋkooɓe, njulaŋkeeje pamare e hatojinɓe e keftinirgol haala ngam eeltude e ɓamtude gogaaɗe keɓotooɗe e peñcu wano gannorɗe sawto.
Aɗa waawi anndinde min ko waɗ-maa yiɗde momtude nanngite maa?
Content available under a <licenseLink>Creative Commons license</licenseLink>
Loowdi waɗaa ko e jamirol <licenseLink>Creative Commons license</licenseLink>
Contributors record voice clips by reading from a bank of donated sentences.
Wallitooɓe nanngitto lefon sawto so tarde iwɗe e gerngal konnguɗi dokkaaɗi.
Don't see your language on Common Voice yet?
A suwaa yiy ɗemngal maa e Common Voice tawo?
Don’t see your language reflected in the Dataset? To request a language head over to our Languages page.
A yiytaaki ɗemngal maa e Leemre keɓe ndee? Ngam ɗaɓɓitde ɗemngal, yaaɓ to hello ɗemɗe amen toh.
Download the Single Word Target Segment
Do you have ideas on how we can make the Common Voice dataset better? Let us know on Discourse
Aɗa jogii miijooji no min ɓamtirta Leemre keɓe Common Voice ndee? Haalan-min e DIscourse
Do you want to Speak, Listen or both?
Aɗa yiɗi haalde, heɗaade walla ɗiɗi fof?
During contribution submission feedback will be skipped after clicking 'Submit'. Contribution will continue directly with the next set of 5 recordings or validations.
Tuma naatnoygol ballitol maa, duttinal maa diwe ɓaawo dobagol e "Naatnu". Ballital maa jokku e saasi to nanngitte walla jaalɗine 5 dewɗe heen.

Each entry in the dataset consists of a unique MP3 and corresponding text file. Many of the { $total } recorded hours in the dataset also include demographic metadata like age, sex, and accent that can help train the accuracy of speech recognition engines. The dataset currently consists of { $valid } validated hours in { $languages } languages, but we’re always adding more voices and languages. Take a look at our Languages page to request a language or start contributing.

Temre kala e leemre keɓe ndee jogii ko MP3 mum keeriiɗo jahdoowo e fiile binndol. Keewɗi e { $total } waktuji nanngito gonɗe e leemre keɓe ndee ena njogii metaakeɓe leƴrenndiije wano duuɓi, njogoram e ngaddiin baawɗe wallude eeltude ceeɓndam masiŋaaji keftingol haala Leemre keɓe ndee e oo sahaa ko waktuuji { $valid } jaaɗinaaɗi e ɗemɗe { $languages }, kono amin ɓeyda sawtooji e ɗemɗe goɗɗe e sahaa fof. Yillo hello Ɗemɗe amen ngam ɗaɓɓitde ɗemngal walla fuɗɗo wallitde.
Email is already used for a different account
Iimeel oo ina huutoree e konte goɗɗe kisa
Enter email to send a sign up link
Naatnu iimeel ngam neldude jokkorde winndito
Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required.

For every voice clip donated, and every audio clip validated, your account dashboards are updated to reflect your latest progress in each language you contribute to. Yes, you can contribute to more than one!

Use dashboards to track your stats, see how you're doing alongside others in the community, and set daily or weekly contribution goals.

Kala lefel sawto dokkangel, e kala lefel ojoo jaalɗinangel, tiimtorde konte maa hesɗitinte ngam hollude taaɓagol maa cakkitiingol e ɗemɗe kala ngal mballittaa. Eey, aɗa waawi wallitde e ko ɓuri ɗemngal gootal!

Huutoro tiimtorde ngam rewindaade limte maa, njiyaa no golle maa mbaadi e woɗɓe e renndo ngoo, kisa taƴaa paandaale ballitte ñalngu walla yontere.

For these launched languages the website has been successfully <localizationGlossaryLink>localized</localizationGlossaryLink>, and has enough <sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink>sentences collected</sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink> to allow for ongoing <speakLink>Speak</speakLink> and <listenLink>Listen</listenLink> contributions.

Ɗee ɗemɗe kurminaaɗe ko ɗemɗe <localizationGlossaryLink>nokkuɗinɗe</localizationGlossaryLink> lowre ndee haa timmi, kadi ena njogii <sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink>konnguɗi doɓindaaɗi</sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink> ngam aaɓnoo jokkeede e ballitte <speakLink>Haal</speakLink> e <listenLink>Heɗo</listenLink>.
Great! How many clips a week?
Great! How many clips per day?
Great work!<playIcon></playIcon> Listen again when you're ready
Golle peewii!<playIcon></playIcon> Heɗto kadi so a hebiima
Having an account is not required to contribute, though it is helpful.
Jogaade konte waɗɗaaki ngam wallitde, kono ena nafa.
Having a profile is not required to contribute though it is helpful, see why below.
Jogogol heftinirde wonaa ko waɗɗii ngam wallitde hay so haɗum nafa, yiy ko saabii ɗum les ɗoo.
Help Common Voice reach { $hours } hours in a language with a personal goal
Help create Common Voice’s first target segment in { $locale }
Wallu taƴannde toɓɓaande addannde Common Voice e { $locale }
Help reach { $hours } hours in { $language } with a personal goal
Help teach machines how real people speak, donate your voice at { $link }
Wallu jannginde masiŋaaji no yimɓe woodɓe kaalirta, rokkir sawto maa e { $link }
Help us build a community around voice technology, stay in touch via email.
Wallu min mahde renndo toppitiingo karalle sawto. Haal daande dow e iimeel.
Help us build a high quality, publicly open dataset
Wallu min mahde leemre keɓe lobbere, udditiinde
Help us find more voices, share your goal
Wallu min yiytude sawtooji goɗɗi, lollin faandaare maa
Help us find others to donate their voice!
Wallu min dañde woɗɓe rokkooɓe sawto mum en!
How can I get the Common Voice data?
Hol no keɓirat-mi keɓe Common Voice?
How does Common Voice calculate hours?
Hol no Common Voice hiisortoo waktuuji?
How do you ensure anonymity and privacy of the people who donated their voices?
Oɗon ngaadii suuraare inɗe e sutoro yimɓe hokkuɓe sawto mum'en ɓee?
How would you describe your accent?
I am a non-native speaker and I speak with an accent, do you still want my voice?
Mi muynaani ɗemngal ngal etee ɗemngal am ina loggi, aɗa heddii e yiɗde daande am?
I'd like to receive emails such as goal reminders, my progress updates and newsletters about Common Voice.
Miɗo hatojini e heɓde iimeeluuji wano ciiftinooji, kesɗitine taaɓagol am e ɓatakeeji kabrirɗi baɗte Common Voice.
I just created a personal goal for voice donation to #CommonVoice -- join me and help teach machines how real people speak { $link }
Acabo de crear un obxectivo persoal de doazón de voz a #CommonVoice -- únase e axúdeme a ensinarlles ás máquinas como falan as persoas reais { $link }
I'm okay with you handling this info as you explain in Mozilla's <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>
Mi jaɓii toppitoɗaa ngoo humpito hono no no paccirɗaa e <privacyLink>Dawrugol suturo</privacyLink>Mozilla
Interested in learning more and contributing to the project?
Aɗa hatojini e ɓeydude anndude ɗ wallitde eɓɓoore ndee?
Humpito konte am woni ko e peñcu?
Is the goal of Common Voice to build a voice assistant?
Mbete faandaare Common Voice ko mahde heedorde sawto?
It contains words or phrases that are hard to read or pronounce.
Ena waɗi kelme walla kaalanɗe mettuɗe tarde walla wowlude.
It is written in a language different than what I’m speaking.
Winndaa ko e ɗemngal ngal jiidaa e ngal kaalat-mi ngal
Join the Common Voice mailing list
Tawtu doggol cargol Common Voice ngol
Keep track of your progress and metrics across multiple languages.
Rewindo taaɓagol maa e meetere maa e ɗemɗe keewɗe.
Keep track of your progress with a profile
Keep track of your progress with a profile and help our voice data be more accurate.
Rewindo taaɓagol maa huutoraade heftinirde kadi maballaa keɓe amen sawto ɓeydaade seeɓde.
Language request successfully submitted, thank you.
Naamnal ɗemngal naatnaama no haanirta, a jaaraama.
Leaving now means you’ll lose your changes
Goppugol jooni firti ko a waasat bayle maa
Leaving now means you'll lose your progress
Yaltude jooni firti ko maa waas taabagol maa
LibriSpeech is a corpus of approximately 1000 hours of 16Khz read English speech derived from read audiobooks from the LibriVox project.
LibriSpeech ko ndoɓri ngigiindi hakke waktuuji 1000 haala Engeleere taraande ittaande e defte hito to eɓɓoore LibriVox toh.
Log in or sign up to get started
Log In / Sign Up with { $company } email
Looks like there aren't any clips to listen to in this language. Help us fill the queue by recording some now.
Ena wayi no alaa lefon keɗeteeɗe e ngal ɗemngal. Wallu min hebbinde doggol ngol so nanngitaade heen seeɗa.
Make your submitted data as rich as possible by providing some anonymous demographic data. We de-identify all demographic data before making it public.
Alɗin keɓe naatnuɗaa ɗo mbaawka maa haaɗi ndokkaa keɓe nguurndam aadee ɗe cuurtaaka. Min momtat heftinirde kala keɓe nguurndam aadee hade min waɗde ɗum e peñcu.

Maybe our <homepageLink>homepage</homepageLink> will help? To ask a question, please join the <matrixLink>Matrix community chat</matrixLink>, monitor site issues via <githubLink>GitHub</githubLink> or visit <discourseLink>our Discourse forums</discourseLink>.

Ma a taw jokkol <homepageLink>jaɓɓorgo</homepageLink> amen ena waawi wallude ma? Ngam weddaade naamnal, tiiɗno yantu e <matrixLink>jeewte renndo Matix</matrixLink> ɗee, ndewindo-ɗaa caɗe lowre to <githubLink>GitHub</githubLink> walla njillo-ɗaa <discourseLink>fom amen Discourse</discourseLink>.

Most of the data used by large companies isn’t available to the majority of people. We think that stifles innovation. So we’ve launched Common Voice, a project to help make voice recognition open and accessible to everyone.

Ko heewi e keɓe ɗe gollorɗe mawɗe kuutortoo keɓotaako wonande yimɓe heewɓe. hamin cikki ɗum ina ñoƴƴa pental. Ɗuum noon min ummini Common Voice, eɓɓoore walloore uddit-de heftinirde daande mo kala neɗɗo waawi heɓde.

Most of the data used by large companies isn’t available to the majority of people. We think that stifles innovation. So we’ve launched Project Common Voice, a project to help make voice recognition open to everyone.

Ko heewi e keɓe ɗe gollorɗe mawɗe kuutortoo keɓotaako wonande yimɓe heewɓe. Aamin cikki ɗum ina ñoƴƴa pental. Ɗuum noon min ummini eɓɓoore Common Voice, eɓɓoore walloore waɗde heftinirde sawto udditaniinde kala neɗɗo.

Most speech databases are trained with an overrepresentation of certain demographics which results in a bias towards <articleLink>male and middle class</articleLink>. Accents and dialects that tend to be under-represented in training data sets are typically associated with groups of people who are already marginalised. Many machines also struggle to understand female voices. This is why in our voice database we want variety!

Keɓe keftinirkon haala ɓurɗe heewde ko eeltaaɗe tawa won leƴrenndooje ena ɓurtinaa, kisa ɗum wufta e wuuraare faade e <articleLink>worɓe e dañɓe</articleLink>. Ngaddinaaji e caltuɗe ŋakkooje e leeme keɓe eeltugol ena keewi yahdineede e dente yimɓe ɓurɓe joñeede e yeebeede. Kadi masiŋaaji keewi ena cugga e keftingol sawtooji rewɓe. Ko ɗuum waɗi amin cokli limlimtam e diiñorde keɓe sawto amen.
Mozilla Common Voice is an initiative to help teach machines how real people speak.
Mozilla Common Voice ko eɓɓoore ngam wallude masiŋaaji jaŋngude no yimɓe kaaldata jaati.

Mozilla is dedicated to keeping the web open and accessible for everyone. To do that we need to empower web creators through projects like Common Voice. As voice technologies proliferate beyond niche applications, we believe they must serve all users equally. That means investing in more languages and accommodating diverse accents and demographics when building and testing voice technologies. Common Voice is a public resource available to everyone and Mozilla teams and developers around the world are already using it on our own projects as well.

Mozilla ena daranii ñiiɓnude geese ɗee e udditaanade mo woni kala. Ngam waɗde ɗuum, amin cokli doolnude sosiyaŋkooɓe geese rewde e eɓɓooje hono Common Voice. Sahaa mo karalle sawto ɓeydii heewde haa njalti jaaɓnirɗe dowrowe, amin ngongɗini eɗe poti nafde huutorɓe kala e mbaadi potal. Ɗuum firti ko waɗde doole e ɗemɗe kese kam e jaɓɓaade ngaddiinaaji kesi e leƴrenndooje tuma mahgol e ƴeewtagol karalle sawto. Common Voice ko jeyaande peñcu heɓotoonde mo woni kala etee goomuuji e topayɓe Mozilla wonɓe e jookli winndere ndee nana kuutoroo nde kam'en ne e eɓɓooje amen keeriiɗe.
Aɗa sokli ballal seeɗa baɗte ngaddin?
Aɗa sokli ballal seeɗa e caltuɗe?
No gravatar found for your email
Note: When set to 'Visible', this setting can be changed from the <profileLink>Profile page</profileLink>
Tesko: so waɗaama e 'Ena yiyoo', ngol teeltol ena waawi wayleede to <profileLink>Hello heftinirde</profileLink> toh
Note: You will still need to select between Speak or Listen to change contribution type.
Tesko: maa sokloy labaade hakkunde Haal walla Heɗo ngam waylude sifaa ballital.

Now that you know a little bit more about Common Voice, why not try it out? Click on the microphone icon to start reading sentences aloud.

If you prefer to review other people's voice contributions, click on the play icon. You’ll help confirm that recordings match the sentences written on screen.

Tawde haŋkadi e ɓeydiima andude baɗte Common Voice, a etotaako jooni? Dobo e maandel mikkoroo ngel ngam fuɗɗaade tarde konnguɗi daande dow.

So ɓur-ɗaa hatojinde ko reftaade ballitte yimɓe woɗɓe, dobo e maandel tato ngel. Maa wallu teeŋtinde wonde nanngite ɗee ena njahdi e konnguɗi jaltuɗi e yahnirde.

Now you can donate your voice to help us build an open-source voice database that anyone can use to make innovative apps for devices and the web. Read a sentence to help machines learn how real people speak. Check the work of other contributors to improve the quality. It’s that simple!

Aɗa waawi hokkirde sawto maa ngam wallude-min tafde diiñorde keɓe nde sewnde-udditiinde nde mo woni kala waawi huutoraade ngam waɗde jaaɓde kesamkeseme kuutorteeɗe e kaɓirdi kam e geese. Tar konngol ngam wallude masiŋaaji ekkaade no neɗɗo e jaati haaldata. Ƴeewto golle wallitoode woɗɓe ngam ƴellitde moƴƴugol. Ko noon wayi weeɓde!
On desktop devices you can contribute by downloading…
E kaɓirɗe ordinateer aɗa waawi wallit-de ngaawtoɗaa…
On iOS please continue with Safari to enable recording…
E iOS tiiɗno jokku e Safari ngam waawnude nanngitogol…
Optionally join on our email list for updates and new information about the project.
So a welaama aɗa waawi yantude e doggol iimeeluuji amen ngam kesɗitine e kabaruuji kesi baɗte eɓɓoore ndee.

Optionally submitted demographic data (e.g. age, gender, language, and accent) will never be made public on your profile, and will not be linked to your account in the dataset. Individual audio clips will be associated with demographic data for the purpose of more accurate analysis - for example, a researcher might want to target a training model to a specific demographic segment.

Keɓe ɗe leƴrendiije mbaɗɗaaki naatneede (yeru: njogoram, ɗemngal, ngaddiin) mbaɗetaake e peñcu hay sahaa e heftinirde maa, kadi jokketaake e konte maa e leemre keɓe ndee. Lefon ojoo teelɗe maa njokkondire e keɓe leƴrendiije ngam moƴƴinde siko - yeru, biɗtoowo ena waawi toɓɓunde annorde eelto hucca e taƴannde leƴrendiire heeriinde.

Our source text is made up of original contributor donations as well as dialogue from public domain movie scripts like <italic>It’s a Wonderful Life</italic>.
You can view our source sentences in this <githubLink>GitHub folder</githubLink>.

Binndol sewde amen waɗiraa ko dokkanɗe asliije wallitooɓe kam e jeewte ummiiɗe e ciimte leppi sinimaa jeyi peñcu hono <italic>It’s a Wonderful Life</italic>.
Aɗa waawi yiyde konnguɗi amen sewnde e ndee <githubLink>runngere</githubLink>.
Overall project status: see how far we’ve come!
Ngonka eɓɓoore ndee e kuuɓal: ƴeew ɗo njetti-ɗen!
Personal dashboards keep you up-to-date with individual and community progress.
Tiimtorde heeriinde ena hollu maa ko ɓuri hesɗude e taabagol neɗɗo walla renndo fof.
Press play, listen & tell us: did they accurately speak the sentence below?
Ɓoɗɗu tarde, heɗaade e haalan-min: Ɗe kaalii koŋngol les ɗoo haa feewi?
Press { shortcut-play-toggle } to toggle play mode
Ñoƴƴu{ shortcut-play-toggle } ngam tolƴaade mbayka taro
Profile information improves the audio data used in training speech recognition accuracy.
Humpito heftinirde ina ƴellita keɓe ojoo kuutoraaɗe e peewgol heftinirde daande.
Read more on our About page
Jokku taro to hello amen Ɓaɗte
Ready to add your voice or lend your ear?
A hebiima ɓeydude sawto maa walla luɓde nofru?
Receive emails such as challenge and goal reminders, progress updates, and newsletters about Common Voice.
Heɓ iimeeluuji hono ciiftinooji ko fad-maa e faandaare maa, kesɗitine taaɓagol maa, e ɓatakeeji baɗte Common Voice.
Recording voice clips is an integral part of building our open dataset; some would say it's the fun part too.
Nanngitaade lefon sawto jeyaa tigi ko e mahde leemre keɓe amen udditiiɗe; won wiy-ɓe nih ko ɗoon ɓuri jirwude.
Return here to edit your goal anytime.
Ruɗɗo ɗoo ngam taƴtaade faandaare maa nde njiɗ-ɗaa kala
Rutto to Leeme Keɓe Common Voice
Review & re-record clips here as you go
Ƴeewto & nanngito kadi lefon laawol gootol
Ƴeewto & nanngito kadi lefon so a soklii
See how your progress compares to other contributors all over the world.
Yiy hol no ɓeydagol maa yerondirta e ngol wallitooɓe e nder winndere ndee fof.
Share your { $count } Clip Daily Goal for { $type }
Share your { $count } Clip Weekly Goal for { $type }
Sign up for Common Voice newsletters, goal reminders and progress updates
Winndito e ɓatakeeji Common Voice , ciiftine faandaare e kesɗitine beydagol.
Sorry, Common Voice is running slowly. Thanks for your interest.
Ɗaccu hakke, Common Voice ena leeli. A jaaraama e golle maa.
Speak in your normal voice! The way you speak is welcome here - we want your accent as it is, and we want your usual volume, style and intonation.
Haaldu no keew-ɗaa haaldude nih. No kaaldataa nih ena hatojinaa ɗoo - min njiɗi ko kaaldaa ngaddin maa oo siforii nih, kadi hito maa, daande e no kaaldataa tawa waylaaki.

Speech is often the most natural way we communicate with each other and voice technologies are bringing that convenience to our computers and mobile devices. We want to empower developers to build amazing voice recognition applications like real-time translators and voice-enabled digital assistants. But right now most of the voice data required to build these kinds of apps is expensive and proprietary. We hope the Common Voice dataset will give developers what they need to innovate and make speech technology available in their own language.
To make voice recognition even more universal, we're collecting voice samples in widely spoken languages as well as those with a smaller population of speakers often underserved by commercial speech recognition services. Publishing a diverse dataset of voices will empower developers, entrepreneurs, and entire speech communities to address this gap themselves.

Haala woni ko ɓuri tagoɗinde e no jokkondirirten hakkunde men etee maa karalle sawto ɗee ngaddu ɗeen baawtine e ordinateeruuji men e kaɓirɗi cinnde men. Min njiɗi ko doolnude topayɓe yoo mah jaaɓnirɗe keftinirɗe sawto moolanaaɗe wono pirooje e saasi e keedooje ɓeydaaɗe sawto. Kono oo sahaa ko ɓuri heewde e keɓe coklaaɗe ngam mahde hono ɗeen jaaɓɗe ena tiiɗi kadi ko jeyaaɗe. Amin ɗaminii leemre keɓe Common Voice ndee maa hokku topayɓe ko ɓe cokli ngam kesamhesnude e waɗde karalle haala heɓaade e ɗemɗe maɓɓe keeriiɗe.
Ngam waɗde keftingol sawto winnderewol, amin ndoɓindoo juɓɓanɗe e ɗemɗe ɓurɗe haaleede ɗee kam e ɓurɗe famɗude renndo haalooɓe ɗe nganndu-ɗaa ena keewi ko ɗawaa e carwe keftingol haala julorteeɗe ɗee. Bayyinde leemre keɓe sawto limtoɗinnde maa doolnu topayɓe, yeñcinamgolle en, e renndooji haala kuuɓɗi ngam ñawndude ɗeen ŋakke kamɓe e koye maɓɓe.
Speech-to-text (STT) technologies convert voice data into text.
Karalle haala-to-binndol (STT) ƴettat sawto waɗta ɗum binndol.
Start typing to describe your accent
Fuɗɗo tappude ngam sifaade ngaddin maa
Do not reject clips where the speaker ‘has an accent’ that is different to your own - this is important for voice recognition to work better for everyone.
Hoto riiwtu hito ɗo kaaloowo oo ‘ena jogii ngaddin’ mo jiidaani e mo mah - Ɗuum eba teeŋti sanne ngam Heftingol Hito ena waawa yuɓɓande mo woni kala.
Tatoeba is a large database of sentences, translations, and spoken audio for use in language learning. This download contains spoken English recorded by their community.
Tatoeba ko diiñorde keɓe konnguɗi, firooji e ojoo gowlaaɗo mawnde ngam huutoraade e jaŋde ɗemɗe. Ngol gaawtol ena jogii Engleleere wowlaande nanngitaande renndo ngoo.
Thanks for confirming your account, now let's build your profile.
A jaaraama e teeŋtingol konte maa, jooni noon mahen heftinirde maa.
Thanks to contributions from over 259k people in over 50 languages, this data is being used to train speech-enabled applications to better respond to the human voice.
Alla e ballitte ko ɓuri 259k neɗɗo e ko ɓuri ɗemɗe 50, ɗee keɓe nana kuutoree ngam eeltude jaaɓnirɗe ɓeydaaɗe-haala yoo ɓyr waawde faamde daande neɗɗaŋke.
Thank you for recording!<lineBreak></lineBreak>Now review and submit your clips below.
A jaaraama e nanngitagol!<lineBreak></lineBreak>Jooni ƴeewto kisa naatnaa lefon maa les ɗoo.

Thank you for your interest in contributing to { $lang }. We work hard to get every language ready for launch and keep the teams updated via email. If you want to contribute, please provide your email below.

A jaaraama e katojinal maa e addude balle e { $lang }. Amina ngolla tiiɗɗe ngam heɓlude ɗemngal kala ngam waawa fuɗɗaade kadi jokkude humpitde guumuuji huutoraade iimeel. So aɗa yiɗi wallitde, tiiɗno hokku iimeel maa les ɗoo.

The Clip Graveyard consists of voice clips that didn't make it into the Common Voice dataset. Just like the dataset, the Clip Graveyard is available for download.
We would like to thank the following people and organizations for their help with the project:
Genaale Lefon ɗee ko lefon sawto koriiɗe ɓennude to leemre keɓe Common Voice ndee. Hono leemre keɓe ndee nih, Genaale Lefon ɗee ena waawi aawteede.
The clip has disrespectful or offensive language.
Lefel ngell ena waɗi haala nehtorka walla mbonka.

The Common Voice dataset complements Mozilla’s open source voice recognition engine Deep Speech. The first version of Deep Speech was released in November 2017 and has continued to evolve ever since. Together with the Common Voice dataset, we believe this open source voice recognition technology should be available to everybody. It’s our hope these technologies will enable developers to build a wave of innovative products and services.

Leemre keɓe Common Voice timminta musiŋ keftinirɗo sawto sewnde-udditiinde mo Mozilla hono Deep Speech. Yamre Deep Speech adannde bayyinanoo ko e Yarkomaa 2017 kadi nana jokki e ƴelliteede gila ndeen. Kañum e leemre keɓe Common Voice, amin ngoongɗiɗi ɗee karalle keftinirgol sawto udditiiɗe ena poti heɓaade e mo woni kala. Ko ɗaminaare amen wonde ɗee karalle maa mballu topayɓe mahde haralde jaaɓnirɗe e carwe kesamhesamiiɗe.
The Common Voice Dataset contains hundreds of thousands of voice samples that help developers build voice recognition tools.
Leemre Keɓe Common Voice ndee ena waɗi teemedde ujunnaaje jubbanɗe sawto ballooje topayɓe mahde kutorɗe keftinooje sawto.

The Common Voice dataset is an open and publicly available resource that can be used to train a wide variety of speech-enabled applications. To protect the security of our contributors, we ask everyone who downloads the Common Voice dataset to respect contributors’ privacy.
All voice clips in the dataset are scrubbed of personally identifying information. When you download the dataset, you agree to not attempt to determine the identity of any contributor. That means you cannot try to link information in the dataset to a contributor’s personal information. You may, however, use the dataset to train speech recognition, speaker recognition, or other applications, by, for instance, linking information in the dataset to other information already in the dataset.

Leemre keɓe Common Voice ndee ko jeyaande udditiinde heɓotoonde e peñcu waawnde huutoreede ngam eeltude jaaɓɗe ɓeydaaɗe haala ɗe fannuuji jaajɗe limtoɗinɗe. Ngam reende kisal wallitooɓe amen, min naamnoto mo woni kala gaawtotooɗo Leemre keɓe Common Voice ndee yoo hormo suturo wallitooɓe ɓee.
Lefon sawto ngonkon e leemre keɓe kon fof ko momtaaɗe kala humpito waawngo heftine neɗɗo. So aɗa aawtoo Leemre keɓe ndee, a jaɓat waasde etaade anndude neɗɗo ballitoowo oo. Ɗuum firti ko a waawaa etaade jokkondirde humpito Leemre keɓe ndee e humpito heeraniingo ballitoowo oo. Aɗa waawi noon, huutoraade Leemre keɓe ndee ngam eeltude keftinirgol haala, keftingol kaaloowo, walla jaaɓnirɗe goɗɗe, so, yeru jokkondirde humpito wonngo e Leemre keɓe ndee e humpito woɗngo tawaango e Leemre keɓe ndee.

The Common Voice dataset is available for download under the <licenseLink>CC0</licenseLink> license on <datasetLink>our Datasets page</datasetLink>. You can also download several other publicly available datasets from the same page.

Leemre keɓe Common Voice ndee ena heɓoo e gaawtol fawaade e jamirol <licenseLink>CC</licenseLink> to <datasetLink>Hello amen Leemre Keɓe</datasetLink>. Aɗa waawi kadi aawtaade leeme keɓe goɗɗe gonɗe e peñcu e ngoon hello.
The count of voice recording hours that have been validated by 2 out of 3 users with a vote of “Yes”. These mark progress toward the overall project 10k hours goal.
Limoore waktuuji nanngitagol sawto jaalɗinangol huutorɓe 2 e nder 3 tawa ko daande “Eey”. Ɗii maantotoo taaɓal huccande happo waktuuji 10K eɓɓoore ndee e kuuɓal.
The count of voice recording hours we have collected so far.
Ɗum ɗoo ko limoore waktuuji sawtooji doɓindaaɗi tawo.

The goal of the Common Voice dataset is to enable anyone in the world to build speech recognition, speaker recognition, or any other type of application that requires voice data. A voice assistant is just one of many types of applications you could use the dataset to build.

Faandaare leemre keɓe Common Voice ndee ko wallude mo woni kala e winndere ndee mahde keɓtinirgol haala, kaaloowo walla fannu jaaɓnirɗe kala naamniingu keɓe sawto. Heedorde sawto ko geɗel tan e fannuuji jaaɓnirɗe keewɗe baawɗe huutoraade leemre kece ndee.

The multi-language version of the Common Voice dataset is currently undergoing community supported bundling and cleaning. If you would like to help us bring Common Voice to new languages, go check out the <sentenceCollectorLink>Sentence Collection Tool</sentenceCollectorLink> for adding new sentences to the dataset, and Mozilla <pontoonLink>Pontoon</pontoonLink> for translating the website itself. New languages are added to Common Voice for voice contribution when 5000 approved sentences have been collected.

Yamre limtiɗemɗiire leemre keɓe Common Voice woni oo sahaa ko e mahngo e suɓto. So aɗa yiɗi wallude min naatnude Common Voice e ɗemɗe kese, yah ƴeewoy kuutorgal <sentenceCollectorLink>Roɓindorde Konnguɗi</sentenceCollectorLink> ngam ɓeydude konnguɗi kesi e leemre keɓe ndee, e <pontoonLink>Pontoon</pontoonLink> mo Mozilla ngam firde lowre ndee e jaati. Ɗemɗe kese ɓeydete e Common Voice ngam wallitde so konnguɗi 5000 jaɓaaɗi keɓaama.
The number of recordings and which languages you contribute to will be public.
Nanngitte ɗee no poti e ɗemɗe ɗe mballittaa maa ngon e peñcu.
The process by which a contributor’s profile information is obscured from their donated voice clips when packaged for download as a part of the dataset.
Ko niɓɓiɗingol humpito heftinirde kuutoro waasa jeyeede e lefon sawto ndokkakon so ɗe kaɓɓaama ngam aawtodeede e leemre keɓe ndee.
Nanngitogol ngol ina juuti no feewi.
Nanngitogol ngol ina raɓɓiɗi no feewi.

These languages are currently under community development. <localizationGlossaryLink>Website localization</localizationGlossaryLink> and <sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink>sentence collection</sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink> is needed to launch.

Ɗee-ɗoo ɗemɗe ngoni oo sahaa ko e topayru. Pale taaɓagol ɗee kollirta ko hol to ɗemngal kala yahrata e fannu <localizationGlossaryLink>nokkuɗinal lowre</localizationGlossaryLink> kam e <sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink>roɓindagol konnguɗi</sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink>.
The selected file is too large
Fiilde suɓaande ndee ina mawni no feewi
The sentence has a grammatical or spelling error.
Konngol ngol ena waɗi juumre celluka walla mbinndiin.
The sentence has disrespectful or offensive language.
Konngol ngol ena waɗi haala coofka walla nehtorka.

The site will be back up as soon as possible. For the latest information, please join the <matrixLink>Matrix community chat</matrixLink> or visit <githubLink>GitHub</githubLink> or <discourseLink>our Discourse forums</discourseLink> to submit and monitor site experience issues.

Lowre ndee maa danndito ɗo yaajtii. Ngam heɓde humpito sakkitiingo, tiiɗno yantu e <matrixLink>jeewte renndo Matrix</matrixLink> walla njillo-ɗaa <githubLink>GitHub</githubLink> walla <discourseLink>forum amen Discourse</discourseLink> ngam naatnude e rewindaade caɗe dawtol lowre.
The TED-LIUM corpus was made from audio talks and their transcriptions available on the TED website.
Ndoɓri TED-LIUM waɗiraa ko jeewte ojoo e binnditte mum keɓotooɗe to lowre TED toh.
This is approximately the number of hours required to train a production speech-to-text system.
Ɗuum woni hakke limoore waktuuji baɗɗiiɗi ngam eeltude yuɓɓo faggininngo haala-to-binndol.
This is a use case driven segment containing data to power spoken digit recognition and yes / no detection.
Ɗum-ɗoo ko taƴannde toɗɗiinde fannu kuutoragol jogiinde keɓe ngam doolnude keftingol limooje gowlaaɗe kam e ejtagol eey / alaa.
This is our process for translating and adapting our content for many locales (languages).
Ɗum woni laawol amen ngam firde e jaaɓtinde loowdi amen e caltirɗe keewɗe (ɗemɗe).

This setting controls your leaderboard visibility. When hidden, your progress will be private. This means your image, user name and progress will not appear on the leaderboard. Note that leaderboard refresh takes ~{ $minutes }min to populate changes.

Ngol teeltol kañum ɗowata jiyagol maa e doggol ardiiɓe. So suuɗaama, taaɓagol maa ko cuuringol. Ɗum firti ko natal maa, innde kuutoro e taaɓagol njaltataa e doggol ngol. Tesko wonde kesɗitingol doggol ngol ena ɓama ~{ $minutes } hojom ngam yaltinde bayle ɗee.
Today's Common Voice progress on clips recorded
Taaɓagol Common Voice hannde e lefon nanngitakon
Today's Common Voice progress on clips validated
Taaɓagol Common Voice hannde e lefon njaalɗinakon
To make it into the Common Voice dataset, a voice clip must be validated by two separate users.
Ngam ɓenninoyeede to leemre keɓe toh, lefel sawto maa jaalɗinee yimɓe ɗiɗo seertuɓe.

To make the Common Voice dataset as useful as possible we have decided to only allow source text that is available under a Creative Commons (CC0) license. Using the CC0 standard means its more difficult to find and collect source text, but allows anyone to use the resulting voice data without usage restrictions or authorization from Mozilla. Ultimately, we want to make the multi-language dataset as useful as possible to everyone, including researchers, universities, startups, governments, social purpose organizations, and hobbyists.

Ngam Leemre keɓe Common Voice waɗa nafoore tigi min cuɓii ko yamirde so wonaa binndol sewnde tawa woni ko e jamirol Creative Commons (CC0). Huutoraade nanondiral CC0 firti ko yiytude e roɓindaade binndi ɓurata saɗtude kono maa gooto kala waaw huutoraade keɓe sawto jaltuɗe e majji tawa alaa kaɗe kuutoragol walla jamirooje ummiiɗe e Mozilla. E ndaɓɓa, min njiɗi ko waɗde leemre keɓe limtiɗemɗiire ndee haa nafa mo woni kala, woni wiɗtooɓe, jaaɓikaaɗtirɗe, startup en, laamuuji, pelle faandaare renndo e hatohatolinɓe.
{ $totalHours } hours is achievable in just over { $periodMonths } months if { $people } people record { $clipsPerDay } clips a day.
waktuuji { $totalHours }ena waawi timmude e ko seɓilebbi { $periodMonths }soyimɓe { $people }nanngitiimalefon { $clipsPerDay }ñalawma
To the right we outline the benefits and clarify what information we make public. Use the links below to get started with a Common Voice account on your own device.
E bannge ñaamo oo, mon kollirat ɓure kam e humpitooji ɗi min mbaɗata e peñcu. Huutoro jokkorɗe les ɗee ngam fuɗɗoraade konte Common Voice e kaɓirgol maa.
Track progress here and on your stats page.
Rewindo taaɓagol maa ɗoo kam e hello maa limte.
Upload aborted. Do you want to delete your recordings?
Jollugol dullii. Aɗa yiɗi momtude nanngitogol maa?
Upload of this clip keeps failing at server. Reload the page or try again later.
Upload of this clip keeps failing, keep retrying?
Users validate the accuracy of donated clips, checking that the speaker read the sentence correctly.
Huutorɓe jaalɗinat ceeɓndam lefon ndokkakon, ɓe ƴeewtoo so gowloowo oo tarii konngol ngol no moƴƴirta.
Validating donated clips is equally important to the Common Voice mission. Take a listen and help us create quality open source voice data.
Jaalɗinde lefon ɗe woɗɓe ndokkii ena teeŋti sanne e golle Common Voice. Heɗo heen ngam wallude min sosde keɓe sawto udditiiɗe lobbe.
Variants are a specific form of a language - for example shared by those living in a geography or commmunity. Sometimes these are called dialects.
Caltuka ko haala keeriika - wano kaaleteeka e diiwaan keeriiɗo maa renndo. Sahaaji ena wiyee ngaddiin.
View your progress against personal and project goals.
Yiy taaɓagol maa takko paandaale maa e nɗe eɓɓoore
Voice clips are entered into a submission queue that readies them for listening.
Lefon sawto kon naatnete e doggol naatnaaɗe keblowol keɗagol majji.

Voice is natural, voice is human. That’s why we’re excited about creating usable voice technology for our machines. But to create voice systems, developers need an extremely large amount of voice data.
Sawto ko tago, ko e neɗɗo jeyaa. Ɗuum waɗi amin keppani sosde karalle sawto kuutorteeɗe e masiŋaaji men. Kono ngam sosde juɓɓe sawto, topayɓe ena cokli keɓe sawtooji keewɗi haa wooroo.
Voice is natural, voice is human. That’s why we’re fascinated with creating usable voice technology for our machines. But to create voice systems, an extremely large amount of voice data is required.
Sawto ko tago, ko e neɗɗo jeyaa. Ɗuum waɗi amin cummbanoo sosde karalle sawto kuutorteeɗe e masiŋaaji men. Kono ngam sosde juɓɓe sawto, jogaade keɓe sawto keewɗe haa wooroo ena waɗɗii.

Voice recognition technology is revolutionizing the way we interact with machines, but the currently available systems are expensive and proprietary. Common Voice is part of Mozilla’s initiative to make voice recognition technologies better and more accessible for everyone. Common Voice is a massive global database of donated voices that lets anyone quickly and easily train voice-enabled apps in potentially every language.

Karalle keftingol sawto nana wayla kesamhesamaagu jotondiral men e masiŋaaji, kono juɓɓe goodɗe oo sahaa ɗee ko jeyaaɗe. Common Voice jeyaa ko e miijo Mozilla ngam ɓeydude ƴellitaare karalle keftingol sawto kadi tawa mo woni kala ena haɓa heen. Common Voice ko diiñorde keɓe maamaare sawtooji dokkaaɗi ballooje mo woni kala e mbaadi njaawndi eeltude jaaɓɗe ɓeydaaɗe sawto e ɗemgal kala goodngal.
Wonaa tan sawtooji tan min ndoɓindotoo e ɗemɗe ɓurɗe yaajde ɗee kono kadi e ɗemɗe ɓurɗe famɗude haalooɓe. Bayyinde leemre keɓe sawtooji limtindiinde maa doolnu topayɓe, yeñcinamgolle en e renndooji ngam ɓe ñawnde ndeen ŋakkere kamɓe e koye maɓɓe. Kadi takko leemre keɓe Common Voice ndee, amin mahora masiŋ keftinirɗo haala ena wiyee Deep Speech.

Voice recognition technology is revolutionizing the way we interact with machines, but the currently available systems are expensive and proprietary. Mozilla Common Voice is an initiative to make voice recognition technologies better and more accessible for everyone. Common Voice is a massive global database of donated voices that lets anyone quickly and easily train voice-enabled apps in potentially every language.
We're not only collecting voice samples in widely spoken languages but also in those with a smaller population of speakers. Publishing a diverse dataset of voices will empower developers, entrepreneurs, and communities to address this gap themselves.

Karalle keftingol sawto nana wayla kesamhesamaagu jotondiral men e masiŋaaji, kono juɓɓe goodɗe oo sahaa ɗee ko jeyaaɗe. Common Voice ko miijo Mozilla ngam ɓeydude ƴellitaare karalle keftingol sawto kadi tawa mo woni kala ena haɓa heen. Common Voice ko diiñorde keɓe maamaare sawtooji dokkaaɗi ballooje mo woni kala e mbaadi njaawndi eeltude jaaɓɗe ɓeydaaɗe sawto e ɗemgal kala goodngal.
Wonaa tan sawtooji tan min ndoɓindotoo e ɗemɗe ɓurɗe yaajde ɗee kono kadi e ɗemɗe ɓurɗe famɗude haalooɓe. Bayyinde leemre keɓe sawtooji limtindiinde maa doolnu topayɓe, yeñcinamgolle en e renndooji ngam ɓe ñawnde ndeen ŋakkere kamɓe e koye maɓɓe. Kadi takko leemre keɓe Common Voice ndee, amin mahora masiŋ keftinirɗo haala ena wiyee Deep Speech.
VoxForge was set up to collect transcribed speech for use with Free and Open Source Speech Recognition Engines.
VoxForge waɗiraa ko roɓindaade haala mbinnditaaka ngam huutoreede e Masiŋaaji Keftingol Haala de Sewnde-Udditigol

Want to help make Common Voice even better? Great! Get in touch via email or <discourseLink>Discourse</discourseLink> forums, submit site issues via <githubLink>GitHub</githubLink>, or join the <matrixLink>Matrix</matrixLink> community chat.

Aɗa yiɗi wallude Common Voice ɓeydaade moƴƴude? Eyyoo! Jokkondir e amen e iimeel walla forum <discourseLink>Discourse</discourseLink>, naatnu caɗe lowre to <githubLink>GitHub</githubLink>, walla yantu e renndo jeewte <matrixLink>Matrix</matrixLink>
Want updates when we release a new version of the Common Voice dataset? Subscribe to our newsletter.
Aɗa yiɗi tintineede so yamre hesere Leemre keɓe Common Voice bayyinaama? Lulno e ɓataake habrirde amen.
We are building an open and publicly available dataset of voices that everyone can use to train speech-enabled applications.
Min ngoni ko e mahde leemre keɓe sawto udditiinde e heɓotoonde e peñcu nde mo woni kala ena waawi huutoraade ngam eeltude jaaɓnirɗe ɓeydaade haala.
We at Mozilla are building a community around voice technology. We would like to stay in touch with updates, new data sources and to hear more about how you're using this data.

Minen wonɓe to Mozilla min ngoni ko e darnude renndo toppitiingu karalliwal sawto. Amin njiɗi jokkude kumpital huutoraade kesɗitine, cewɗe keɓe kese kadi ngam ɓeydude humpito baɗte o kuutorto-ɗaa ɗee keɓe.
We at Mozilla are building a community around voice technology. We would like to stay in touch with updates, new data sources and to hear more about how you're using this data.
Min ga Mozilla gaa, amin cosa renndo toppitiingo karallagal daaɗe. Amin njiɗi njokkondiren ngam keɓaa kesɗitine, cewɗe keɓe kese kadi min keɓa e no kuutorto-ɗaa ɗee keɓe.

We believe that large and publicly available voice datasets foster innovation and healthy commercial competition in machine-learning based speech technology. This is a global effort and we invite everyone to participate. Our aim is to help speech technology be more inclusive, reflecting the diversity of voices from around the world.

Amin ngoongɗini leeme keɓe sawto mawɗe keɓotooɗe e peñcu maa ƴellit kesamhesamaagu e pompondiral njulaaŋkaagal kisngal e jaŋde-masiŋaaji kam e karalle haala. Ɗum ko darnde huuɓnde etee amin mbismii mo woni kala yoo jeye heen. Faandaare amen ko wallude mbete karalle haala ena nodda mokala, yahda e keewal daaɗe e nder winndere ndee.

We believe that large, publicly available voice datasets will foster innovation and healthy commercial competition in machine-learning based speech technology.
Common Voice’s multi-language dataset is already the largest publicly available voice dataset of its kind, but it’s not the only one.
Look to this page as a reference hub for other open source voice datasets and, as Common Voice continues to grow, a home for our release updates.

Amin ngoongɗini leeme keɓe sawto mawɗe keɓotooɗe e peñcu maa ƴellit kesamhesamaagu e pompondiral njulaaŋkaagal kisngal e jaŋde-masiŋaaji kam e karalle haala.
Leemre keɓe limtiɗemɗiire Common Voice heɓii wonde jooni tan leemre keɓe heɓotoonde e peñcu ɓurnde mawnude e nanndo mum'en, kono wonaa kañum taw woodi.
Ƴeew ngoo hello ngam ngarngal tugnorgal leeme keɓe sawto udditiiɗe, kam e nokkuure ɗo njaltinten kesɗitine e oo tuma mo Common Voice ɓeydotoo yaajde.
We calculate hours by estimating the average length of each recording, and then multiplying that number by the total number of recordings across all languages.
Min kiisortoo waktuuji ko ɓetde pecindol njuuteendi nanngitol kala, kisa min cowondira ndeen limoore e limoore limoore nanngitte ɗemɗe ɗee fof.
We couldn’t find that page for you
Min koriima yiytande ma hello ngo
We may have run out of clips - refresh the page, or try again later.
En ngaynii lefon njaalɗinteekon e ngal ɗemngal...
We promise to handle your information with care. Read more in our <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>.
Amin ngaadani maa huutoraade humpito maa e nuunɗal. Ɓeydu humpito to <privacyLink>Ciifol Suturo</privacyLink>.
We promise to handle your information with care. Read more in our <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>.
Amin ngaadani maa huutoraade humpito maa e nuunɗal. Ɓeydu humpito to <privacyLink>Ciifol Suturo</privacyLink>.
We’re building an open source, multi-language dataset of voices that anyone can use to train speech-enabled applications.
Min ngoni ko e mahde leemre keɓe sawto, limtiɗemɗiire, udditiinde e heɓotoonde e peñcu nde mo woni kala ena waawi huutoraade ngam eeltude jaaɓnirɗe ɓeydaade haala.
We’re crowdsourcing an open-source dataset of voices. Donate your voice, validate the accuracy of other people’s clips, make the dataset better for everyone.
Amin nodda ballondiral e leemre keɓe sawtooji. Hokkir sawto maa, jaalɗin ceeɓndam lefon yimɓe woɗɓe, waɗ leemre keɓe ndee ɓeydoo moƴƴanɗe mo woni kala.
Amin njogii caɗe dartagol ɗe tijjaaka
We're receiving a lot of traffic and are currently investigating the issues.
Amin eɓa yillotooɓe heewɓe oo sahaa, min ngoni ko e yuurnitaade caɗeele ɗee.
We’re sorry, your platform is not currently supported.
Amin njahnoo, dinnderde maa tammbitaaka oo sahaa.
We've run out of sentences to record in this language...
En ngaynii konnguɗi jaalɗinteeɗi e ngal ɗemngal...

We want the Common Voice dataset to reflect the audio quality a speech-to-text engine will hear in the wild, so we’re looking for variety. In addition to a diverse community of speakers, a dataset with varying audio quality will teach the speech-to-text engine to handle various real-world situations, from background talking to car noise. As long as your voice clip is intelligible, it should be good enough for the dataset.

Min njiɗi ko Leemre keɓe Common Voice nannda keelɗugol ojoo masiŋ haala-to-binndol nanoyta e weeyo, wadde min njiylotoo ko limlimtam. Kam e renndo haalooɓe limlimtinde, leemre keɓe waɗnde keelɗugol ojoo limlimtinde maa janngin masiŋaaji haala-tobinndol gollaade e ngonka goongiray-goonga, foti ko e haala ngoɗɗuka walla dille oto. Tawde tan lefel sawto maa ena faamnii, engel fota naatde e leemre keɓe ndee.
We will be in touch with more information about how to add your language to Common Voice very soon.
Ma min njokkondir e maa e humpito woɗngo baɗte no ɓeydirtaa ɗemngal maa e Common Voice ko yaawi.
We will be in touch with more information as it becomes available.
Ma en njokkondir ngam ɓeydande-ma humpito so fuɗɗiima heɓaade.
We will not make your email public.

We will review your request to remove your voice recordings from the dataset. If your request is approved, we will contact those who have downloaded the dataset and request they remove your voice recordings as well.
Ma min njuurnito ɗaɓɓaande maa momtude nanngite maa e lemre keɓe ndee. So ɗaɓɓitaande maa jaɓaama, ma min njokkondir e aawtiiɓe leemre keɓe ndee ngam naamnade yo ɓe lomtu nanngite maa kamɓe ne.
What does it mean that I can’t “determine the identity” of speakers in the Common Voice dataset?
Hol ko firti wonde mi waawaa “anndude holi haalooɓe” e leemre keɓe Common Voice ndee?
What issues are you experiencing with this sentence?
Hol caɗeele ndañɗaa e ngol koŋngol?
What kind of goal do you want to build?
What level of audio quality is required for a voice clip to be used in the dataset?
Hol ɗo keelɗugol ojoo foti tolnaade ngam lefel sawto huutoree e leemre keɓe ndee?
What’s inside the Common Voice dataset?
Ko woni nder leemre keɓe Common Voice ndee?
What’s the difference between Common Voice and Deep Speech?
Hol ko seerndi Common Voice e Deep Speech?
When a user rejects a voice clip it returns to the Queue. If rejected a second time, the voice clip is moved to the Clip Graveyard.
So kuutoro riiwtii lefel sawto, ngon ruttoto to Doggol Caɓɓiiɗe. So o riiwtii ngel ɗimmol, lefel hito ngel dirtinee to Genaale Lefon toh.
When will you release Common Voice data in other languages?
Mande bayyinton keɓe Common Voice e ɗemɗe goɗɗe?
Where does the source text come from?
Hol to binndol sewde ngol ummortoo?
Which variant of { $language } do you speak?
Hol ko saabii ɗum ina himmi?
Why don’t you ask people to read from books or Wikipedia articles in different languages?
Ko waɗi a wiyataa yimɓe yo tar e defte walla binndanɗe wikipedia e ɗemɗe goɗɗe?
Why do you need so many different speakers per language?
Ko saabii aɗa sokli haalooɓe heewɓe woɗɓe e kala ɗemngal?
Why is 10,000 validated hours the per language goal for capturing audio?
Ko waɗi waktuuji 10,000 jaalɗinaaɗi woni faandaare ɗemngal kala ngam heɓɓaade ojoo?
Why is Common Voice part of the Mozilla mission?
Hol ko saabii Common Voice jeyeede e eɓɓoore Mozilla?
Why is my language not included yet?
Ko saabii ɗemngal am jeyaaka heen tawo?
Why should I sign up for an account?
Ko saabii mbiɗo foti winnditaade ngam uddit-de konte?
Would you like to request your voice recordings be deleted too, or do you prefer to keep them in the Common Voice dataset?
Aɗa yiɗi ɗaɓɓitde momtugol nanngitte sawto maa ne, walla ɓuran-maa ko mooftude ɗe e Leemre keɓe Common Voice ndee?
Yes, send me emails. I’d like to stay informed about the Common Voice Project.
Eey, neldee kam iimeeluuji. Miɗo hatojini e humpitaade baɗte Eɓɓoore Common Voice.
Yes, send me emails. I'd like to stay informed about the progress of this language on Common Voice.
Eey, neldam iimeeluuji. Miɗo yiɗi humpitaade baɗte ɗo golle ɗee njahrata e ngal ɗemngal e Common Voice.

Yes, we especially want your voice! Part of the aim of Common Voice is to gather as many different accents as possible so that voice recognition services work equally well for everyone. This means donations from non-native speakers are particularly important.

Eey, amin cokli sawto maa e jaati! Ena jeyaa e paandaale Common Voice renndinde ngaddinaaji keewɗi ɓurɗi seertude mbete carwe keftinirkon sawto moƴƴana gooto e men kala. Ɗuum firti ko sawtooji ɓe muynaani ɗemngal noon foti teeŋtude.
You are about to initiate a download of <size>{ $size }GB</size>, proceed?
Ngonɗaa ko e fuɗɗaade aawtogol <size>{ $size }GB</size>, aɗa jokka?
You are prepared to initiate a download of { $size }
You can choose to make your username public or anonymous.
Aɗa waawi suɓaade waɗde innde kuutoro maa e peñcu walla cuuɗiiɗo.
You can help build a diverse, open-source dataset by creating a Common Voice profile and contributing your voice.
Aɗa waawi mahde leemre keɓe limtoɗinnde, udditiinde so sosde heftinirde Common Voice kisa mbaliitira sawto maa.

Your accent is the way you pronounce words. It can be shaped by where you have lived, which other languages you speak and lots of other factors. You can share any information you feel is relevant here.
Ngaddiin maa ko no ngowlirtaa konngi. Seerndata ngaddinaaji ko ɗo neɗɗo hoti, ɗemɗe goɗɗe ɗe o haalata kañum e geɗe goɗɗe keewɗe.Aɗa waawi waɗde ɗoo humpito kala cikuu-ɗaa ena ɓeydoo faamminde.
Your anonymous voice recordings will remain in the Common Voice dataset. Once you delete your profile you will no longer be able to submit a request to remove your recordings from the dataset
Nanngitte maa niɓɓiɗinaaɗe maa keddo e leemre keɓe Common Voice. So a woodii momtude heɓtinirde maa, a waawataa haŋkadi naatnude ɗaɓɓitaande momtude nanngitte maa e leemrɗ keɓe ndee.
Your daily goal has been created
You’re contributing to a target segment
Aɗana wallita e taƴannde toɓɓaande adannde
You’re contributing to our first target segment
Aɗana wallita e taƴannde toɓɓaande amen adannde
You're currently set to <bold>NOT</bold> receive emails such as goal reminders, my progress updates and newsletters about Common Voice
Oo sahaa ko a cuɓiiɗo <bold>WASDE</bold> heɓde iimeeluuji wano ciiftinooji, kesɗitine taaɓagol am e ɓatakeeji kabrirɗi baɗte Common Voice.
You're currently set to receive emails such as goal reminders, my progress updates and newsletters about Common Voice
Oo sahaa ko a cuɓiiɗo heɓde iimeeluuji wano ciiftinooji, kesɗitine taaɓagol am e ɓatakeeji kabrirɗi baɗte Common Voice.
Your username and email will not be associated with the published data.
Innde kuutoro maa e iimeel maa ndenndinoytaake e keɓe bayyinaaɗe ɗee.
Your weekly goal has been created
You've helped Common Voice reach <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> of our daily { $goalValue } recording goal!
A wallii Common Voice yettaade <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> faandaare nanngitagol amen ñalɗiire { $goalValue } !
You've helped Common Voice reach <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> of our daily { $goalValue } validation goal!
A wallii Common Voice yettaade <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> faandaare jaalɗingol amen ñalɗiire { $goalValue } !
You've successfully signed up for contributing to { $language }. Thank you.
A winnditiima no haanirta ngam wallitde e { $language }. A jaaraama.
